title: Camera and Photographic Equipment Repairers
description: Repair and adjust cameras and photographic equipment, including commercial video and motion picture camera equipment.

tasks.text: Adjust cameras, photographic mechanisms, or equipment such as range and view finders, shutters, light meters, or lens systems, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disassemble equipment to gain access to defect, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Test equipment performance, focus of lens system, diaphragm alignment, lens mounts, or film transport, using precision gauges.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Clean and lubricate cameras and polish camera lenses, using cleaning materials and work aids.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calibrate and verify accuracy of light meters, shutter diaphragm operation, or lens carriers, using timing instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine cameras, equipment, processed film, or laboratory reports to diagnose malfunction, using work aids and specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Read and interpret engineering drawings, diagrams, instructions, or specifications to determine needed repairs, fabrication method, and operation sequence.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure parts to verify specified dimensions or settings, such as camera shutter speed or light meter reading accuracy, using measuring instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fabricate or modify defective electronic, electrical, or mechanical components, using bench lathe, milling machine, shaper, grinder, or precision hand tools, according to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Install electrical assemblies and wiring in aircraft camera housings and memory cards or film in cameras, following blueprints and using hand tools and soldering equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assemble aircraft cameras, still or motion picture cameras, photographic equipment, or frames, using diagrams, blueprints, bench machines, hand tools, or power tools.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Record test data and document fabrication techniques on reports.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Lay out reference points and dimensions on parts or metal stock to be machined, using precision measuring instruments.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Recommend design changes or upgrades of microfilming, film-developing, or photographic equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
